items.summary: Cover page for Goethe-Zertifikat A1 Fit in Deutsch 1 vocabulary list.
Publisher imprint and copyright information from Goethe-Institut.
Table of contents listing preface, themes, word groups, and grammar.
Preface explaining purpose and scope of the A1 vocabulary list.
Thematic inventory of A1 topics across person, home, food, travel, leisure.
Word groups: anglicisms, exam language, jobs, and family members.
Colors, directions, measures, currencies, countries, school subjects, numbers.
Holidays, seasons, months, times of day, clock times, weekdays.
Alphabetical word list letter A with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters A and B with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters B through E with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters E and F with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters G and H with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters H through K with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters K and L with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters L through N with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters N through R with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters R and S with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters S through U with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters V and W with example sentences.
Alphabetical word list letters W and Z with example sentences.
Introduction to the grammar inventory and its role at A1 level.
Overview list of grammar categories: verbs, nouns, adjectives, syntax.
Grammar tables for verb tense, mood, modals, nouns, and articles.
Grammar tables for articles, pronouns, adjectives, and prepositions.
Grammar tables for prepositions and syntax including negation and questions.
Word formation rules for nouns and adjectives with examples.
Back cover with Goethe-Institut Munich address.
